data.title: CMOC Group Limited Schedules Board Meeting to Review Q1 2025 Results
data.description:
China Molybdenum Co ( (HK:3993) ) has issued an update.

CMOC Group Limited has announced that a board meeting will be held on April 25, 2025, to consider and approve the publication of its quarterly results for the first quarter of 2025. This meeting is significant as it will provide insights into the company’s financial performance and strategic direction, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder interests.

More about China Molybdenum Co

CMOC Group Limited is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating in the mining industry. The company is primarily involved in the extraction and processing of minerals, with a focus on molybdenum and other related products.

data.description:
Mount Gibson Iron Limited ( (AU:MGX) ) has issued an announcement.

Mount Gibson Iron Limited has announced an update regarding its ongoing share buy-back program. As of April 11, 2025, the company has repurchased a total of 38,532,576 of its ordinary fully paid shares, indicating a strategic move to potentially enhance shareholder value and optimize its capital structure.

More about Mount Gibson Iron Limited

Mount Gibson Iron Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing primarily on the extraction and sale of iron ore. The company is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the code MGX and is involved in the production and marketing of iron ore products.

data.title: Equinox Resources Seeks Judicial Review Over Hamersley Project Drilling Dispute
data.description:
Equinox Resources Limited ( (AU:EQN) ) has provided an update.

Equinox Resources Limited has initiated legal proceedings in the Supreme Court of Western Australia to seek a judicial review of a decision by the Aboriginal Cultural Heritage Committee, which declined the company’s application for an infill drilling program at the Hamersley Iron Ore Project. This decision was based on the identification of two new ethnographic sites by Yulur Heritage Services. The outcome of this legal action could impact the company’s ability to advance its resource definition efforts and its overall project development strategy.

More about Equinox Resources Limited

Equinox Resources Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily focusing on the exploration and development of iron ore resources. The company’s key project is the Hamersley Iron Ore Project, which holds significant potential for regional economic development and employment in Western Australia.

Average Trading Volume: 228,128

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: A$10.53M

data.title: Athena Resources Plans Share Issue to Fenix Resources
data.description:
Athena Resources Limited ( (AU:AHN) ) has issued an update.

Athena Resources Limited has announced a General Meeting to be held on May 13, 2025, in Perth, where shareholders will consider a resolution to issue shares to Fenix Resources Limited. This issuance, upon conversion of convertible notes, will increase Fenix Resources’ voting power in Athena from 28.97% to 37.21%, marking a significant shift in shareholder dynamics.

data.title: Bifire S.p.A. Announces Upcoming Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
Bifire S.p.A. ( (IT:FIRE) ) has provided an announcement.

Bifire S.p.A. has announced the publication of the notice for its Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting, scheduled for April 29, 2025, with a potential second call on April 30, 2025. The meeting will address the approval of financial statements, allocation of operating results, and appointments to the Board of Directors and the Board of Statutory Auditors. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it will determine key governance and financial decisions impacting the company’s future operations and strategic direction.

More about Bifire S.p.A.

BIFIRE® is a company active in the production of materials for fire protection and thermal insulation in the construction and industrial sectors. Its products are primarily used in building renovations, particularly with ‘dry’ construction techniques, which offer reduced construction times and costs, improved environmental sustainability, and efficient project execution.

data.title: Standard Chartered Executes Share Buy-Back to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) has issued an announcement.

Standard Chartered PLC has announced the purchase of 1,601,861 of its ordinary shares as part of a share buy-back program. This initiative, executed through J.P. Morgan Securities plc, is part of a broader strategy to optimize the company’s capital structure. The purchased shares will be canceled, reducing the total number of shares in issue to 2,376,496,640, which will also be the total number of voting rights. This move is expected to enhance shareholder value and reflects the company’s confidence in its financial stability and future prospects.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a prominent financial services company incorporated in England and Wales. It operates primarily in the banking industry, offering a wide range of financial products and services. The company is known for its focus on emerging markets, providing services such as personal banking, corporate banking, and wealth management.
